bassshakertelemetry.config.title: Telemetri Bass Shaker
bassshakertelemetry.config.game_sound_de: Yan ero Windows ti Minecraft n lo fun ohun ere deede.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_device: Yan ero Windows ti mod yi n lo fun ijade haptics.
bassshakertelemetry.config.master_volume: Agbara gbogbo fun gbogbo ipa haptics.
bassshakertelemetry.config.page_damage.t: Ṣii awon eto haptics to ni ibatan si ibaje.
bassshakertelemetry.config.page_movement: Ṣii awon eto haptics fun gbigbe ati terrain.
bassshakertelemetry.config.page_misc.too: Ṣii awon eto miran ati awon irinṣẹ.
bassshakertelemetry.config.damage_incomi: Mu haptics ṣiṣẹ nigbati o ba gba ibaje.
Mu haptics ṣiṣẹ nigbati o ba lu nkan pẹlu ikolu melee.
bassshakertelemetry.config.combat_hit_co: Mu esi lilu ti server fọwọsi ṣiṣẹ; o le ni idaduro die ju awọn lilu agbegbe lọ.
Agbara ipa lilu ti server fọwọsi.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_enab: Mu texture gbigbe lemọlemọfún ṣiṣẹ da lori iyara ati isare.
Agbara texture afefe itona nigba gbigbe ninu afefe.
bassshakertelemetry.config.movement_wate: Agbara texture omi itona nigba gbigbe ninu omi.
bassshakertelemetry.config.footsteps_ena: Mu haptics igbese ṣiṣẹ nigba rin tabi sare.
bassshakertelemetry.config.mounted_enabl: Mu haptics igbesẹ ati ipa ṣiṣẹ nigba gigun mount.
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_haptics: Mu haptics ti ohun ere n dari ṣiṣẹ, gẹgẹ bi impacts ati bugbamu.
bassshakertelemetry.config.gameplay_hapt: Mu haptics ere sintetiki ṣiṣẹ, bi mining ati pulse gbigbe.
bassshakertelemetry.config.biome_enabled: Mu awon ifihan kukuru ṣiṣẹ nigbati o ba wọ biome tuntun.
bassshakertelemetry.config.accessibility: Fi HUD han lori iboju lati ṣalaye haptics to n ṣiṣẹ.
bassshakertelemetry.config.demo_run.tool: Ṣi demo kan lati wo ọpọlọpọ ipa.
bassshakertelemetry.config.test.tooltip: Mu idanwo kukuru kan ṣiṣẹ fun ipa yi.
bassshakertelemetry.config.damage_ms.too: Iye akoko igbi ibaje ni millisekondi.
bassshakertelemetry.config.accel_ms.tool: Iye akoko awon igbi isare ni millisekondi.
bassshakertelemetry.config.sound_cooldow: Akoko to kere julọ laarin awon burst haptics ohun.
bassshakertelemetry.config.gameplay_cool: Akoko to kere julọ laarin awon burst haptics ere.
bassshakertelemetry.config.mining_period: Akoko ni millisekondi laarin atunwi pulse mining.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_buffer: Iwọn boofa ohun fun ijade haptics. Awọn boofa kekere dinku latency ṣugbọn o le fa crackle lori diẹ ninu awọn eto.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_eq_fre: Aarin igbohunsafefe ti filter EQ ijade.
bassshakertelemetry.config.output_eq_gai: Iye boost tabi cut fun filter EQ ijade.
bassshakertelemetry.config.smart_volume_: Mu Iwọn ohun oloye ṣiṣẹ fun ipele laifowoyi.
Ipele ijade afojusun ti Iwọn ohun oloye n lo.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_tone_30hz: Mu tone 30 Hz ti o duro ṣinṣin ṣiṣẹ fun tuning.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_tone_60hz: Mu tone 60 Hz ti o duro ṣinṣin ṣiṣẹ fun tuning.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_sweep_20_: Mu sweep ṣiṣẹ lati wa resonance ati awon ibi alailagbara.
bassshakertelemetry.config.cal_stop.tool: Da eyikeyi idanwo kalibireṣonu to n ṣiṣẹ duro.
bassshakertelemetry.spatial.title: Spatial
bassshakertelemetry.spatial_bus.title: Routing bus
bassshakertelemetry.spatial_bus.section: Ṣeto ipa ona fun awon bus inu
bassshakertelemetry.spatial_cal.title: Kalibireṣonu spatial
bassshakertelemetry.spatial_dbg.title: Debugger spatial
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.st: A ti yan: %s | So orisun: %s | Output: %s
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.title: Soundscape (7.1)
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.status.mu: Ko si ero 8ch ti a ri (stereo UI)
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.overrides: Ibamu bọtini gangan (kii ṣe ifamọ si leta nla)
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.enabled.t: Mu tabi pa ipo routing Soundscape.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.groups.to: Ṣatunkọ awon egbe ikanni ti a loruko ti o le ṣiṣẹ bi afojusun routing.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.overrides: Ṣatunkọ overrides routing fun iṣẹlẹ kọọkan da lori awon bọtini debug.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_edi: Ṣatunkọ awon ikanni inu egbe yi.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_del: Pa egbe yi rẹ; egbe aiyipada 'Gbogbo' ko le parẹ.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_nam: Oruko egbe yi, ti a n lo gege bi afojusun routing grp:<name>.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.group_cha: Yipada boya ikanni yi wa ninu egbe naa.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.override_: Bọtini debug lati baamu pelu ibamu gangan ti ko ni ifamọ si leta nla.
Yan ikanni afojusun tabi egbe fun awon iṣẹlẹ to baamu.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.roa: Yan afojusun routing fun awon iṣẹlẹ texture gbigbe.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.dam: Yan afojusun routing fun awon iṣẹlẹ ibaje.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.bio: Yan afojusun routing fun awon iṣẹlẹ agogo biome.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.acc: Yan afojusun routing fun awon iṣẹlẹ igbi isare.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.sou: Yan afojusun routing fun awon iṣẹlẹ haptics ti ohun n dari.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.gam: Yan afojusun routing fun awon iṣẹlẹ ere.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.foo: Yan afojusun routing fun awon iṣẹlẹ igbese.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.mou: Yan afojusun routing fun awon iṣẹlẹ gigun ati fifo.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.min: Yan afojusun routing fun awon iṣẹlẹ ayipo mining.
bassshakertelemetry.soundscape.route.cus: Yan afojusun routing fun awon iṣẹlẹ aṣa tabi mii.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.in: Yan graph irinse ti o fẹ ṣatunkọ.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.re: Tun gbe awon irinse lati disk ki o si ju awon ayipada ti a ko fipamọ silẹ.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.ad: Yan iru node ti o fẹ fi kun.
Fi node tuntun kun ti iru ti a yan.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.se: Ṣeto node ti a yan gege bi output irinse.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.sa: Fipamọ graph irinse lọwọlọwọ sori disk.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.co: Daakọ JSON irinse ti a yan si clipboard.
bassshakertelemetry.instrument_editor.te: Mu idanwo kukuru ṣiṣẹ pelu graph irinse lọwọlọwọ.
